creator: bartequi@neomedia.it
text:
There are minor format problems; I gather that "information identifying
 your 4-STABLE sources" sounds better than "identification information on
 your 4-STABLE sources" (somewhat clumsy).

Fix: 

The attached patch should fix the problems.
